The '''Vorpal Demise''' was a [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld]] [[ZH-25 Questor-class light freighter|ZH-25 Questor]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="ABGTAS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The name of the ''Vorpal Demise'' is the same as the nonsense word ''vorpal'', coined by author Lewis Carroll in the poem "Jabberwocky" from his 1871 novel ''Through the Looking-Glass, and What Alice Found There''. From the context of the poem, ''vorpal'' is recognized as an adjective meaning "sharp" and "deadly", often with implication of use for decapitation (the fate of the Jabberwock).<ref name="ABGTAS" />
